best_practices.best_practice: Use benefit-driven headlines that answer 'What is in it for me?'
Keep headlines under 10 words for maximum impact
Include a power word: Free, New, Proven, Instant, Guaranteed
Write subheads that expand on the headline promise
Use second person (you/your) to speak directly to the visitor
Break copy into scannable sections with clear subheads
Eliminate jargon — write at an 8th grade reading level
Lead with the problem before presenting your solution
Use contrasting colour for CTA buttons that stands out from page
Write action-oriented CTA text: Get, Start, Download, Join
Place primary CTA above the fold and repeat below
Add urgency or scarcity cues near the CTA when authentic
Use directional cues (arrows, eye gaze) pointing to CTA
Make CTA button large enough to tap on mobile (min 44x44px)
Add micro-copy below CTA to reduce anxiety (No credit card required)
Use hero images or videos that show the product in context
Maintain consistent brand colours and typography throughout
Use white space strategically — do not overcrowd the layout
Ensure visual hierarchy guides the eye from headline to CTA
Use real photos over stock images when possible
Keep page width between 960-1200px for optimal readability
Use icons to break up text and illustrate key benefits
Display customer testimonials with real names and photos
Include trust badges: security seals, certifications, awards
Show customer logos or 'as seen in' media mentions
Display specific numbers: '10,000+ customers served'
Add star ratings or review scores near the CTA
Include a money-back guarantee or risk-free trial promise
Show real-time activity: 'X people viewing this right now'
Ask only for essential information — fewer fields = higher conversion
Use inline form validation with real-time error messages
Pre-fill fields when possible from URL parameters or cookies
Place form labels above input fields not beside them
Use multi-step forms for complex data collection
Add progress indicators for multi-step forms
Make the submit button text specific: 'Get My Free Guide'
Load page in under 3 seconds — each second lost = 7% fewer conversions
Compress images to WebP format and lazy-load below-fold images
Minimise HTTP requests — combine CSS/JS files
Use a CDN for faster global delivery
Implement responsive design — 60%+ traffic is mobile
Remove navigation menu to keep visitors focused
Set up proper tracking: UTMs, conversion pixels, heatmaps
Design mobile-first — stack content vertically
Use tap-friendly buttons with adequate spacing
Simplify forms for mobile — use dropdowns over text input
Test on real devices, not just browser resizers
Use click-to-call buttons for phone numbers
Avoid pop-ups that cover content on mobile
Always test one variable at a time in AB tests
Run tests for minimum 2 weeks or 1000 visitors
Reach 95% statistical significance before declaring winner
Test headlines first — they have the biggest impact on conversion
Document every test with hypothesis, result, and learning
Create a testing roadmap — plan tests quarterly
Use heatmaps and session recordings to inform test ideas

product_sales_lp.content_guide: Product name + one-line value proposition. Hero image/video showing product in use. Price prominently displayed. Primary CTA: Buy Now / Add to Cart.
product_sales_lp.design_notes: Full-width hero image. Price in large font. CTA button in contrasting colour above the fold.

product_sales_lp.content_guide: 2-3 sentences describing the pain point your product solves. Use emotional language the customer uses.
product_sales_lp.design_notes: Short paragraph or 3 bullet points. Icon or illustration of the problem.

product_sales_lp.content_guide: 3-5 key features with benefit-oriented descriptions. Each feature should answer: what it does AND why it matters.
product_sales_lp.design_notes: Icon + feature name + 1-sentence benefit. Grid layout (2 or 3 columns).

product_sales_lp.content_guide: 4-8 high-quality product images from different angles. Include lifestyle shots showing the product in context.
product_sales_lp.design_notes: Image carousel or grid. Zoom-on-hover functionality. Include 360-degree view if possible.

product_sales_lp.content_guide: Transform features into outcomes. 'What will change in my life?' Focus on emotional and practical benefits.
product_sales_lp.design_notes: 3-column layout with icons. Before/after comparison if applicable.

product_sales_lp.content_guide: Customer reviews (minimum 3). Star ratings. Number of units sold. User-generated content.
product_sales_lp.design_notes: Star rating summary at top. Individual reviews with name, photo, verified badge.

product_sales_lp.content_guide: Compare your product vs alternatives or vs 'without this product'. Show clear advantages.
product_sales_lp.design_notes: Table format with checkmarks. Your product column highlighted.

product_sales_lp.content_guide: Address top 5-8 objections as questions. Include shipping, returns, warranty, sizing.
product_sales_lp.design_notes: Accordion/expandable format. Keep answers concise (2-3 sentences).

product_sales_lp.content_guide: Money-back guarantee, free returns, warranty details. Make the promise bold and specific.
product_sales_lp.design_notes: Badge or seal graphic. Large bold text: '30-Day Money-Back Guarantee'.

product_sales_lp.content_guide: Limited stock, time-limited offer, special pricing. Only use when genuine.
product_sales_lp.design_notes: Countdown timer or stock counter. Contrasting background colour.

product_sales_lp.content_guide: Repeat the purchase CTA. Add alternative: 'Add to Wishlist' or 'Compare Plans'.
product_sales_lp.design_notes: Sticky bottom bar on mobile. Button matches hero CTA style.

product_sales_lp.content_guide: Payment method logos, security badges, contact information, return policy link.
product_sales_lp.design_notes: Horizontal row of badges. Small text for policy links.

product_sales_lp.section: Show the price early — hiding it increases bounce rate by 30%+
Use odd pricing (e.g. $47 instead of $50) for perceived value
Include shipping cost on the landing page — surprise costs are the #1 cart abandonment reason
Add a size/fit guide for physical products to reduce returns
Use video demonstrations — they increase conversion by 80% on average
Show real customer photos alongside professional product shots
Include a live chat or chatbot for instant purchase support
Offer multiple payment options: credit card, PayPal, Apple Pay, Buy Now Pay Later
Display estimated delivery date to create anticipation
Use cross-sell suggestions sparingly — max 2-3 complementary products

brand_awareness_lp.content_guide: Bold brand statement or manifesto. What does your brand stand for? Lead with purpose and mission, not products.
brand_awareness_lp.design_notes: Full-screen hero with cinematic imagery or video background. Large typography. Minimal navigation.

brand_awareness_lp.content_guide: Describe the bigger problem or movement your brand is part of. Think industry-level, not product-level.
brand_awareness_lp.design_notes: Storytelling format. Statistics or data visualisation to quantify the problem.

brand_awareness_lp.content_guide: Your brand mission and vision in clear, memorable language. Why does your company exist beyond making money?
brand_awareness_lp.design_notes: Quote-style layout. Brand colours prominent. Founder photo optional.

brand_awareness_lp.content_guide: 3-5 core values with real examples of how you live them. Show, do not just tell.
brand_awareness_lp.design_notes: Card layout with icons. Each value gets a short story or proof point.

brand_awareness_lp.content_guide: Key statistics that demonstrate your brand impact: customers helped, projects completed, awards won.
brand_awareness_lp.design_notes: Large numbers with animated counters. Before/after or growth metrics.

brand_awareness_lp.content_guide: Long-form testimonials or mini case studies. Focus on transformation and emotional journey.
brand_awareness_lp.design_notes: Full-width story sections with customer photos. Video testimonials preferred.

brand_awareness_lp.content_guide: Team photos, office culture, manufacturing process, sourcing stories. Humanise your brand.
brand_awareness_lp.design_notes: Photo gallery or video montage. Candid, authentic imagery preferred.

brand_awareness_lp.content_guide: Press mentions, industry awards, certifications. Build credibility through third-party validation.
brand_awareness_lp.design_notes: Logo bar for media. Award badges in a grid. Links to press articles.

brand_awareness_lp.content_guide: Social media feeds, user-generated content, community initiatives, events.
brand_awareness_lp.design_notes: Instagram-style grid. Social proof counters (followers, reviews).

brand_awareness_lp.content_guide: Link to blog, podcast, newsletter, or resource center. Give visitors a reason to stay connected.
brand_awareness_lp.design_notes: Card-style links to top content pieces. 'Subscribe' CTA for newsletter.

brand_awareness_lp.content_guide: Newsletter signup, social media follow, content download. Low-commitment actions that keep the relationship going.
brand_awareness_lp.design_notes: Subtle, non-aggressive design. 'Join our community' language vs 'Buy now'.

brand_awareness_lp.content_guide: Target: 2+ minutes. Measures content engagement depth.
Target: 70%+ reach bottom. Shows content holds attention.
Target: 2%+ share rate. Measures content virality.
Target: 15%+ return rate. Shows brand recall.
Target: 20%+ increase. Measures brand awareness growth.
Target: 3-5% follow rate from page visitors.
Target: 10-15% download rate for gated content.

lead_magnet_lp.content_guide: Compelling headline focused on what the visitor will learn or gain. Lead magnet title + subtitle. Form placed directly in the hero section for immediate visibility.
lead_magnet_lp.design_notes: Split layout: left side copy, right side form. Form above the fold. 3-5 form fields maximum.

lead_magnet_lp.content_guide: Bullet list of 5-7 specific takeaways. Be concrete: 'You will learn X' not 'You will get insights'. Preview 2-3 key findings.
lead_magnet_lp.design_notes: Numbered list or checklist format. Include a mockup or preview image of the deliverable.

lead_magnet_lp.content_guide: Share 1-2 key insights or data points from the content to prove its value. Create a 'fear of missing out' on the full content.
lead_magnet_lp.design_notes: Pull quote or stat callout. Partial infographic or chart from the content.

lead_magnet_lp.content_guide: Define the ideal reader: job title, industry, experience level. Help visitors self-qualify.
lead_magnet_lp.design_notes: 3 persona cards or a simple checklist: 'This is for you if...'

lead_magnet_lp.content_guide: Author bio with credentials. Company expertise. Number of people who have already downloaded.
lead_magnet_lp.design_notes: Photo + bio. Social proof numbers: '5,000+ marketers downloaded'.

lead_magnet_lp.content_guide: What format: PDF, video, template? How many pages? Time to consume? Is it immediately actionable?
lead_magnet_lp.design_notes: Icon-based list: pages, read time, format. Set expectations clearly.

lead_magnet_lp.content_guide: Testimonials from people who used the lead magnet. Quotes about how it helped them.
lead_magnet_lp.design_notes: 1-2 testimonials with photos. Star rating if applicable.

lead_magnet_lp.content_guide: Clear statement: 'We will not spam you.' Privacy policy link. Unsubscribe option mentioned.
lead_magnet_lp.design_notes: Small text near the form submit button. Trust badges.

lead_magnet_lp.content_guide: Repeat the form or a 'Download Now' button lower on the page for visitors who scrolled past the hero.
lead_magnet_lp.design_notes: Simplified version of the hero form. Same CTA styling.

lead_magnet_lp.content_guide: Examples
Industry report, how-to guide, definitive guide, playbook
Spreadsheet template, Notion template, Figma UI kit, email templates
Launch checklist, audit checklist, compliance checklist
ROI calculator, grading tool, assessment quiz
Past webinar replay, masterclass, training video
Customer success story, before/after study, ROI case study
Research findings, industry analysis, thought leadership
Ad examples, email sequences, headline formulas, copy templates
Email course (5-7 days), video mini-course, certification prep
Annual industry report, benchmark data, trend analysis

event_registration_lp.content_guide: Event name, date, time (with timezone), format (live/virtual/hybrid). One-line value proposition: what attendees will learn or gain.
event_registration_lp.design_notes: Bold event name. Countdown timer to event date. Register CTA prominent above the fold.

event_registration_lp.content_guide: Date, time, duration, format, price (or FREE). All critical info scannable at a glance.
event_registration_lp.design_notes: Horizontal bar with icon+text pairs. Sticky on scroll if possible.

event_registration_lp.content_guide: 3-5 specific learning outcomes or agenda highlights. Be specific about what attendees will walk away with.
event_registration_lp.design_notes: Numbered list or timeline format. Each point is actionable and specific.

event_registration_lp.content_guide: Name, title, company, photo, brief bio, key credential. For multiple speakers, highlight the headliner.
event_registration_lp.design_notes: Speaker cards with photos. Social media links. Credentials highlighted.

event_registration_lp.content_guide: Time-blocked agenda showing session topics, speakers, and breaks. For multi-day events, use tabbed views.
event_registration_lp.design_notes: Timeline or table format. Session descriptions expandable. Download agenda as PDF option.

event_registration_lp.content_guide: Define ideal attendee: role, industry, experience level. Help people self-select.
event_registration_lp.design_notes: Persona cards or checklist format. 'This event is for you if...'

event_registration_lp.content_guide: Photos/videos from previous events. Attendee testimonials. Previous attendance numbers.
event_registration_lp.design_notes: Photo gallery. Video highlight reel. Testimonial carousel.

event_registration_lp.content_guide: Logo bar of event sponsors. Partnership credibility signals.
event_registration_lp.design_notes: Tiered logo display (Gold, Silver, Bronze). Brief sponsor descriptions optional.

event_registration_lp.content_guide: Name, email, company, job title minimum. Add dietary/accessibility needs for in-person events.
event_registration_lp.design_notes: Simple form. Group registration option for teams. Early bird pricing if applicable.

event_registration_lp.content_guide: Common questions: Is there a recording? Can I get a refund? What platform? Is there networking?
Social sharing buttons. 'Bring a colleague' referral CTA. Calendar add buttons (Google, Outlook, iCal).
event_registration_lp.design_notes: Share buttons prominent. Pre-written social post for easy sharing.

saas_service_lp.content_guide: Clear product/service name. One-sentence value proposition answering: 'What does it do and for whom?' Primary CTA: Start Free Trial / Book a Demo / Get Started.
saas_service_lp.design_notes: Product screenshot or demo video in the hero. CTA with contrasting colour. No navigation menu.

saas_service_lp.content_guide: 30-90 second product walkthrough. Show the interface or service in action. Focus on the 'aha moment'.
saas_service_lp.design_notes: Embedded video with play button overlay. Autoplay muted option. GIF alternative for fast loading.

saas_service_lp.content_guide: 3-4 primary benefits with outcome-focused language. Not features, but results: 'Save 10 hours/week' not 'Has automation'.
saas_service_lp.design_notes: Icon + benefit headline + 1-sentence description. Grid or column layout.

saas_service_lp.content_guide: 3-5 step process showing how easy it is to get started. Reduce perceived complexity.
saas_service_lp.design_notes: Numbered steps with icons or screenshots. 'Get started in 3 minutes' messaging.

saas_service_lp.content_guide: Compare plans/tiers or compare vs manual processes. Show what is included at each level.
saas_service_lp.design_notes: Comparison table with checkmarks. Most popular plan highlighted.

saas_service_lp.content_guide: Show compatible tools and platforms. 'Works with tools you already use.'
saas_service_lp.design_notes: Logo grid of integration partners. 'And 50+ more' if applicable.

saas_service_lp.content_guide: 2-3 customer success stories with specific metrics: 'Increased conversions by 40%' or 'Saved $50K/year'.
saas_service_lp.design_notes: Before/after metrics. Customer logo + quote + result. Industry-specific if possible.

saas_service_lp.content_guide: Clear pricing tiers if applicable. Annual vs monthly toggle. Highlight best value option.
saas_service_lp.design_notes: Pricing cards (3 tiers max). Feature checklist per tier. 'Most Popular' badge.

saas_service_lp.content_guide: SOC2, GDPR, encryption, uptime guarantees. Address enterprise buyer concerns.
saas_service_lp.design_notes: Badge grid. Security certifications. Uptime percentage display.

saas_service_lp.content_guide: Address trial terms, billing, data portability, onboarding support, contract terms.
saas_service_lp.design_notes: Accordion format. Group by category: Billing, Features, Support, Security.

saas_service_lp.content_guide: Repeat primary CTA with urgency element. 'Start your 14-day free trial — no credit card required.'
saas_service_lp.design_notes: Full-width CTA section. Contrasting background. Testimonial quote nearby.

ab_test_planner.variant_b_challenger: Spring Sale: Your Favourites at 20% Off
ab_test_planner.hypothesis: Specific product mention increases relevance and CTR by 15%
Reducing form fields from 4 to 2 will increase conversion by 25%

ab_test_planner.variant_b_challenger: Try It Free — No Card Needed
ab_test_planner.hypothesis: Adding 'no card' removes friction and lifts signups by 20%
